tours.title: Earth Orbit Pulse
tours.summary: Start with the ISS, compare crewed stations, and widen out to representative satellites.

stops.title: Flagship Station
stops.narrative: Lock to the ISS to understand how the Earth-orbit mode uses propagated tracks.

stops.title: Second Station
stops.narrative: Compare orbital altitude, inclination, and ground-track shape.

stops.title: Science Asset
stops.narrative: Shift from crewed infrastructure to observatories and science payloads.

tours.title: Inner System Scale Shift
tours.summary: Move from Earth out to Mars and feel how the visualization changes from orbit to heliocentric scale.

stops.title: Home Reference
stops.narrative: Earth sets the bridge between the orbit scene and the heliocentric model.

stops.title: Local Moon
stops.narrative: Use the Moon to explain parent-child orbital hierarchy in the scene.

stops.title: Outward Expansion
stops.narrative: Widen the camera to show how distance and orbit paths scale up beyond Earth.

tours.title: NEO Watch Desk
tours.summary: Compare safe, hazardous, and cometary small bodies using close-approach filters.

stops.title: Moderate Flyby
stops.narrative: A manageable close-approach example to orient the feed.

stops.title: Hazard Language
stops.narrative: Show how the UI surfaces hazard metadata without sensationalizing it.

stops.title: Comet Inclusion
stops.narrative: Keep the mode broader than asteroids alone by including notable comets.

tours.title: Local Stellar Neighborhood
tours.summary: Tour nearby stars, bright reference systems, and the shift from live data to cataloged astronomy.

stops.title: Nearest System
stops.narrative: Start with the nearest stellar system and explain why this mode is catalog-driven.

stops.title: Bright Benchmark
stops.narrative: Compare distance and visibility with a familiar bright star.

stops.title: Exoplanet Story
stops.narrative: Use a well-known exoplanet system to bridge science and discovery.

tours.title: Milky Way Context
tours.summary: Move from iconic nebulae to the galactic center and clarify what is cataloged versus live.

stops.title: Star Factory
stops.narrative: Use the Orion Nebula to introduce deep-sky structure.

stops.title: Galactic Center
stops.narrative: Center the story on the Milky Way core and compact-object category.

stops.title: Context Layer
stops.narrative: End with the broad galactic plane and explain why it is a context visualization rather than live telemetry.
